items.title: Review & Preview: 50,000 Sighs of Relief
items.description: After a tumultuous week, stocks staged an impressive rebound, sending the Dow above 50,000 for the first time ever.

items.title: The Dow Surged Past 50,000. How Caterpillar and These Other Stocks Got It There.
items.description: The broader market passed a significant milestone thanks to big gains for stocks outside of tech. Goldman Sachs and Caterpillar are examples.
